abilities.name: marvel-scale
abilities.shortEffect: Increases Defense to 1.5× with a major status ailment.
abilities.effect: Whenever this Pokémon has a major status ailment, it has 1.5× its Defense. This bonus does not count as a stat modifier.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon's marvelous scales boost its Defense stat if it has a status condition.

abilities.name: competitive
abilities.shortEffect: Raises Special Attack by two stages upon having any stat lowered.
abilities.effect: Raises Special Attack by two stages upon having any stat lowered.
abilities.flavorText: Boosts the Pokémon's Sp. Atk stat sharply when its stats are lowered by an opposing Pokémon.

abilities.name: cute-charm
abilities.shortEffect: Has a 30% chance of infatuating attacking Pokémon on contact.
abilities.effect: Whenever a move makes contact with this Pokémon, the move's user has a 30% chance of being infatuated. Overworld: If the first Pokémon in the party has this ability, any wild Pokémon whose species can be either gender has a 2/3 chance of being set to the opposite gender, and a 1/3 chance of having a random gender as usual.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon may infatuate attackers that make direct contact with it.
